item.newswords.katana.tooltip.left: Left Click: Dash forward and deal 5 damage
item.newswords.katana.tooltip.right: Right Click: Spectator mode for 10s (20s cooldown)
item.newswords.rage_blade.tooltip.left: Left Click: 5 base damage (+1 per rage point)
item.newswords.rage_blade.tooltip.right: Right Click: Fire explosion (2 damage per point, consumes all points)
item.newswords.lightblue_dimension_sword: Right Click: Teleport to your cursor
Press R: Invisibility + Invincibility + Speed III for 5s
